title: Same; construction and citation
doc_html:
§3718.  Same; construction and citation

R.S. 13:3717 and 13:3718 shall be interpreted and construed so as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it, and may be cited as the Uniform Proof of Statutes Law.
doc_text:
§3718.  Same; construction and citation
R.S. 13:3717 and 13:3718 shall be interpreted and construed so as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it, and may be cited as the Uniform Proof of Statutes Law.
